meta_title: Codevanta | Base Crypto AI Program + Pro v2.0 Roadmap
meta_description: Codevanta Base is the current $3 crypto AI decision-support program. Pro v2.0 is in development with broader filters, stronger workflow review, and a cleaner operator panel.
hero_badge: Base version live / $3 one-time / Pro v2.0 in development
hero_title: Codevanta Base is live now. Pro v2.0 is already in development.
hero_lead: The current base release is a lightweight crypto AI decision-support program: market scan, weak-setup filtering, setup scoring, and a local workspace flow. Pro v2.0 is planned as the next stronger release, not as something already shipped.
hero_console_copy: Adaptive scoring, protection layers, and ready-to-run bot modes in one workspace.
hero_points: Bot templates for ranging, trend, dip, and futures markets
Risk guardrails and operator dashboard in one place

section_labels.bots_heading: Five trading modes built for different market behavior
section_labels.bots_intro: Instead of one generic bot, Codevanta gives you purpose-built operating modes. Each mode has its own logic, tempo, and risk profile.
section_labels.advantages_heading: Less tab chaos. More repeatable decisions.
section_labels.advantages_intro: The product is designed to feel like an operator desk, not a cluttered exchange panel.
section_labels.workflow_heading: From idea to execution in a clean four-step loop
section_labels.workflow_intro: The platform keeps the path short: scan, prepare, deploy, and review.
section_labels.comparison_heading: What changes when you move from manual trading to Codevanta
section_labels.comparison_intro: The value is not just speed. It is structure, consistency, and less emotional drift.
section_labels.connectors_heading: Built around the exchange stack traders already know
section_labels.connectors_intro: Use the exchanges and market data flows your routine already depends on.
section_labels.quotes_heading: What the workspace changes for active crypto traders
section_labels.quotes_intro: These are the kinds of workflow gains the product is designed to create.
section_labels.plans_heading: Base version is available now. Pro v2.0 is still in development.
section_labels.plans_intro: The current public release is the base program for $3 as a one-time purchase. Pro v2.0 is the next roadmap build with broader analysis depth and a cleaner operator workflow.
section_labels.faq_heading: Questions traders usually ask before they commit
section_labels.faq_intro: Short answers to the operational questions that matter before onboarding.
section_labels.cta_heading: Buy the current base version for $3 and track the Pro v2.0 roadmap separately.
section_labels.cta_copy: If you want the working release today, use the base version. If you want the more advanced release with broader analysis layers, that is the Pro v2.0 line now in development.

bot_profiles.label: Grid Flow
bot_profiles.title: Range capture bot for slow, repetitive market structure
bot_profiles.summary: Designed for sideways zones where price keeps rotating inside a clear band and patience matters more than aggression.
bullets: Layered entries across a defined zone
Automatic spacing control when volatility expands
Profit ladder designed around repeated mean reversion

bot_profiles.label: DCA Shield
bot_profiles.title: Averaging engine with guardrails for high-conviction positions
bot_profiles.summary: Built for traders who want systematic scaling without letting one entry decision dominate the whole trade idea.
bullets: Capital exposure limits visible from the start
Exit map prepared together with the entry plan

bot_profiles.label: Dip Hunter
bot_profiles.title: Momentum retrace bot for fast pullback entries
bot_profiles.summary: Made for active markets where trend stays intact, but the best entries appear only after a clean flush and reset.
bullets: Retrace validation before the bot goes active
Strength scoring around trend continuation conditions
Quick invalidation if the bounce lacks quality

bot_profiles.label: Futures Pulse
bot_profiles.title: Directional futures mode with volatility-aware protection
bot_profiles.summary: A faster operating profile for short-term futures setups that need strong control over invalidation and exposure.
bullets: Risk windows tied to volatility regime

bot_profiles.label: Combo Engine
bot_profiles.title: Hybrid mode that blends signal scoring with bot automation
bot_profiles.summary: The most flexible profile for traders who want AI scoring to decide when a bot should stay passive and when it should act.
bullets: Bot activation can wait for a score threshold
Signal quality filters weak or noisy entries
Review loop keeps strategy logic consistent over time

advantages.title: One workspace instead of scattered tools
advantages.copy: Bot logic, setup review, watchlists, and routine checkpoints sit in one operating surface.

advantages.title: Strategy modes with distinct personalities
advantages.copy: You do not force every market into the same template. Each bot mode is built for a specific rhythm.

advantages.title: Decision support before execution
advantages.copy: The platform is designed to slow down weak entries and surface the cleaner ones first.

advantages.title: Reviewable process, not just raw signals
advantages.copy: Operators can inspect why a setup was scored, filtered, delayed, or approved.

workflow_steps.title: Choose the market posture
workflow_steps.copy: Start from range, trend, dip-buying, or futures momentum instead of forcing one strategy onto every coin.

workflow_steps.title: Let the engine score the setup
workflow_steps.copy: Trend, volatility, and confirmation layers help decide whether the market deserves action or silence.

workflow_steps.title: Deploy with guardrails
workflow_steps.copy: Entry ladder, risk band, and target logic are prepared before the bot becomes active.

workflow_steps.title: Review and refine the routine
workflow_steps.copy: A clear workspace makes it easier to see what should scale, pause, or be reconfigured next.

comparison_rows.label: Market scanning
comparison_rows.manual: Dozens of tabs and subjective filters

comparison_rows.label: Bot selection
comparison_rows.codevanta: Dedicated modes for range, DCA, dip, futures, and hybrid

comparison_rows.label: Risk preparation
comparison_rows.codevanta: Exposure caps and ladder planning before launch

quotes.quote: The main win was not more trades. It was cutting the low-conviction ones before they drained attention.
quotes.name: Danylo M.

quotes.quote: The app feels closer to an operator dashboard than a bot gimmick. That made it easier to trust the process.
quotes.name: Kira V.

quotes.quote: I liked being able to separate ranging logic from trend logic instead of pretending the market is always the same.
quotes.name: Roman K.

plans.name: Base Version
plans.description: This is the real working base build available now. It is not a full SaaS suite and it is not pretending to be the future Pro release.
features: Real-time market scan and setup review
Signal filtering using EMA, RSI, ATR, and VWAP context

plans.name: Pro v2.0
plans.description: This version is not released yet. It is the planned stronger build with broader filters, refined workflow review, and more mature operator logic.
features: Cleaner workflow review and stronger setup confirmation
More refined strategy modules and analysis depth
Status: roadmap only, not shipping yet

faq.question: Is Codevanta fully automated?
faq.answer: The product is presented as an automation workspace with AI-guided deployment logic. The public demo focuses on workflow, bot modes, and operator structure rather than real-money execution.

faq.question: Can I register right now?
faq.answer: Yes. The live static version includes local browser registration so you can open the workspace instantly and explore the app flow without waiting for a backend setup.

faq.question: What kind of trader is it for?
faq.answer: It is designed for traders who want less emotional clicking, more process visibility, and strategy modes that match different market regimes.

faq.question: Do I need coding knowledge?
faq.answer: No. The operator flow is meant to feel like a control panel, not a developer console.

register.title: Create your Codevanta workspace
register.copy: Register a local account in this browser and jump directly into the sandbox dashboard.
benefits: Instant access to the workspace demo
Saved profile in your current browser

login.title: Return to your operator desk
login.copy: Use your existing local workspace account to reopen the dashboard.
login.help: This demo stores access only in the current browser.

ui.upgrade_path_copy: Use the static workspace as the public demo layer. If you need real server-side auth and persistent user accounts, the next step is attaching a backend auth service and database.

auth_messages.invalid_register: Enter a valid name, email, and password.
auth_messages.email_exists: This email already has a local workspace. Log in instead.
auth_messages.no_workspace: No local workspace found for this email.
auth_messages.password_mismatch: Password does not match this local workspace.

app.title: Your operator dashboard
app.copy: A fast workspace to review market posture, bot readiness, watchlist priorities, and the next actions for the session.
activity: Combo Engine flagged BTC for a controlled breakout review.
DCA Shield paused one ladder because volatility expanded too fast.
Dip Hunter moved ETH from watch to confirmation after momentum improved.
Risk guardrails stayed above the session threshold.

footer_text: Codevanta is designed as a crypto automation workspace and decision-support environment. It is not a guarantee of returns.
